expectations.text: custom-button.tsx should import and use shadcn/ui Button
expectations.evidence: File imports `Button` from `@/components/ui/button` and renders it directly, passing mapped variant/size props.

expectations.text: custom-badge.tsx should import and use shadcn/ui Badge
expectations.evidence: File imports `Badge` from `@/components/ui/badge` and renders it with mapped color prop.

expectations.text: custom-separator.tsx should import and use shadcn/ui Separator
expectations.evidence: File imports `Separator` from `@/components/ui/separator` and passes orientation prop.

expectations.text: All migrated components should preserve their original props interfaces
expectations.evidence: All three files retain the exact same interface names, prop names, types, and defaults as the originals.

expectations.text: Migrated components should not duplicate shadcn/ui built-in styles
expectations.evidence: Components delegate styling to shadcn/ui primitives; only mapping logic and `cn(className)` remain.
